description:
Ich habe mehrere existierende SolidWorks-Modelle, die in ihrer Winkelgeometrie präzise an kundenspezifische Vorgaben angepasst werden müssen. Der Kunde liefert mir dafür detaillierte technische Zeichnungen; auf deren Basis sollst du ausschließlich die Winkelgrade einzelner Komponenten ändern – Form, Reihenfolge oder Anordnung der Teile bleiben unverändert.

Deine Aufgabe gliedert sich in drei Schritte: 
1. Übernehmen und prüfen der bereitgestellten Zeichnungen sowie der aktuellen SolidWorks-Baugruppen. 
2. Exakte Anpassung aller geforderten Winkelgrade inklusive Aktualisierung der zugehörigen Einzelteil- und Baugruppenzeichnungen. 
3. Export der finalen Daten als produktionsreife STEP-Dateien, optimiert für die CNC-Bearbeitung.

Wichtig ist, dass alle Maße, Toleranzen und Bohrbilder nach der Änderung konsistent bleiben und innerhalb von SolidWorks eindeutig bemaßt sind. Bitte arbeite versionssicher (SolidWorks 2020 oder neuer) und dokumentiere jede Änderung kurz im Modell-History-Baum, damit der Fertiger später jeden Schritt nachvollziehen kann.

Wenn du Erfahrung mit ähnlichen Winkelkorrekturen, CNC-gerechten STEP-Exports und sauberer Zeichnungspflege hast, freue ich mich auf deine Unterstützung.
preview_description: Ich habe mehrere existierende SolidWorks-Modelle, die in ihrer Winkelgeometrie präzise an kundenspez
title: SolidWorks Winkelanpassung mit STEP-Ausgabe

******
- Scope of Work

The selected developer will be responsible for the development, configuration, integration, and testing of SAP interfaces between the Asset Performance Management platform and the Customer SAP environment.

The scope includes:

* Development of SAP objects, including RFCs, BAPIs, IDocs, and custom ABAP developments.
* Configuration and development activities within SAP S/4HANA, SAP PO, and SAP CPI (SAP Integration Suite).
* Development of outbound interfaces from SAP to external applications using SAP CPI.
* Collaboration with the Customer SAP team to ensure compliance with Customer standards, procedures, and governance requirements.
* Participation in integration testing, troubleshooting, and deployment activities.

* Upon onboarding, the developer will work directly within the Customer SAP environment and coordinate closely with the Customer SAP organization.

Experience in large-scale industrial, utility, or oil & gas environments is highly desirable.

If you are interested and have suitable resources available, please provide:

description:
I need a small, cloud-hosted application that lets our Hurghada-based office keep one clean register of every customer, every trip and every transfer we organise. 

Core flow 
• I enter a new lead or walk-in through a simple form that captures the fields we already use on paper: Tour, Date, Hotel, Room, Name, Phone, Adults, Children (5-10 and 0-5), Country, Pick-up time and Collect point. 
• From the same screen I can confirm the booking and instantly push a pre-filled WhatsApp message to the client that repeats those details and adds our “Trips & Transfers Hussein +20 1066463886 / Have a great trip!” footer. The template must support both the longer and the shorter variant I included in the brief. 
• I can later open any record, update it or cancel it; the customer should also be able to edit their own reservation through a secure link we send them. 

Back office 
A single dashboard should show upcoming trips, allow quick search by name, hotel or date, and let me export a daily pick-up list. Because I chose cloud storage, the data must live online so my colleagues can log in from several PCs in the office without worrying about backups. 

What I’m looking for 
• A ready-to-use, browser-based (or lightweight mobile-friendly) app with an admin login for us and a limited self-service view for clients. 
• Built-in WhatsApp integration—either the business API or reliable third-party gateway—triggered by one click from inside the booking screen. 
• Clean UI; English labels are fine, I will add Polish/Arabic copy myself if needed. 
• Deployment to a low-cost cloud (Firebase, Supabase, AWS, Heroku, your suggestion) plus a short hand-over session so I can manage users and change the message template. 

Acceptance 
The job is done when I can: 
1. Add a booking, see it in the dashboard and edit it. 
2. Send myself a WhatsApp confirmation that contains all fields correctly. 
3. Open the client link and modify the booking as the customer. 
4. Export tomorrow’s pick-up list as CSV or PDF. 

If this sounds straightforward to you and you have already connected apps to WhatsApp, let’s talk about timeline and the best stack for a small operation like ours.
preview_description: I need a small, cloud-hosted application that lets our Hurghada-based office keep one clean register
title: Travel Agency Client Database

description:
# Project Title

**Create German motion graphics videos for Schugle — 10s hero loop, 30s reel, 2min explainer**

---

NOTICE: there are bidders for EUR 1450. The budget is USD 1400! (no matter what freelancer makes of it)

---

# Project Description

I am looking for a creative motion graphics / explainer video freelancer to create **three related promotional videos** for **Schugle**, a German web product for teachers.

Website:
[https://schugle.de](https://schugle.de)

Reference page with existing basic tutorial videos:
[https://schugle.de/einstieg](https://schugle.de/einstieg)

The existing videos are only simple “getting started” tutorials. This new project is different. I need **promotional / explanatory clips** that make the idea of Schugle more attractive, memorable and emotionally clear.

The current website is rather factual. The videos should make the idea more engaging, while still feeling calm, credible, professional and suitable for schools.

---

# About Schugle

Schugle helps teachers create, formulate, structure and revise **Förderpläne** using AI.

A key idea is that sensitive pupil data should be protected before AI processing. Real pupil names should not go into the AI. Schugle works with protected placeholders instead.

The emotional idea is not “generic AI for education”. It is more specific:

**From scattered teacher notes and time pressure to clear, usable Förderplan language — with privacy protection built in.**

The video should help communicate:

* less writing effort for teachers
* clearer Förderplan structure
* AI-supported formulation
* protection of sensitive pupil data
* calm, trustworthy support for everyday school work

---

# Deliverables

I need three related videos with the same look and feel:

1. **10-second video**

 * Also usable as a silent hero/background loop on the Schugle website
 * Should work without voiceover
 * Should be visually calm enough for a website hero area

2. **30-second video**

 * Promotional/social/reel version
 * Suitable for website, LinkedIn, social media or short ads

3. **2-minute explainer video**

 * More detailed explanation of the Schugle idea
 * May reuse material from the 10s and 30s videos

All three clips must feel like one coherent visual campaign.

---

# Language

The videos are for a German product.

* German on-screen text is required.
* I may provide or change German voiceover/audio later.
* The freelancer does not necessarily need to record German voiceover.
* However, the freelancer must understand the purpose of the German text and design around it.

For non-German speakers:

**“Schugle” is pronounced like “shoe” + the “gle” from “Google”.**

The name is inspired by **“Schule”** and **“gemeinsam”**. This does not need to be explained directly in the video, but the feeling should fit: school-related, supportive, structured and collaborative — without generic school clichés.

---

# Important Style Direction

Please do **not** use generic education stock footage such as:

* happy teachers
* smiling children
* classroom clichés
* chalkboards
* graduation caps
* cartoon children
* generic “school app” imagery

Schugle should feel:

* professional
* calm
* intelligent
* trustworthy
* modern
* helpful
* suitable for schools and teachers

As a reference for tone and audience fit, please also look at https://foerder-fokus.de. I like that it speaks to a German teacher / Förderpraxis audience in a calm, practical and credible way — for example around the ideas of less paperwork, more focus on the child, structure, overview and professional support. Schugle should not copy this site or its visuals, and Schugle is a different product, but the videos should aim for a similarly trustworthy German school-sector feeling, with a slightly more modern and distinctive Schugle look.

I am especially interested in visual ideas such as:

* scattered notes becoming structured Förderplan text
* anonymised placeholders replacing real names
* teacher workload becoming clearer and lighter
* AI support shown subtly, not as flashy sci-fi
* the Schugle tilted “g” icon becoming a visual motif
* text fragments transforming into calm, usable plan language

Possible visual direction:

**Messy notes → structured thoughts → protected placeholders → AI-assisted formulation → clear Förderplan.**

---

# Brand Assets

The Schugle logo and tilted **“g”** icon are available as SVG files.

These should be used as part of the visual identity. Creative, subtle animation of the logo/icon is welcome.

The videos should have a consistent visual language that could also influence a future revision of the Schugle website.

---

# Editable Text, Audio and Rights

This is very important.

German text and audio must remain editable after project completion. I must be able to change German text or audio later without recreating the whole video.

Therefore, the freelancer must deliver:

1. Final exported videos with text.
2. Clean versions without text, where appropriate.
3. Editable source/project files.
4. German text as editable text layers, not flattened or permanently baked into the only final files.
5. Separate audio files/tracks for music, sound effects and voiceover placeholders.
6. Subtitle/caption files if subtitles are used, preferably SRT or VTT.
7. A list of all fonts, stock assets, icons, templates and music used, including license terms.
8. Written confirmation that I may edit, adapt, reuse and publish the videos for Schugle marketing, website hero backgrounds, social media, ads and future website revisions.

Please state clearly which software and editable formats you will provide, for example:

* After Effects
* Premiere Pro
* DaVinci Resolve
* Final Cut
* Blender
* Figma
* Canva
* other

Final MP4 files alone are not enough.

---

# What I Expect in Your Proposal

Please do not send a generic proposal.

Before bidding, please review:

* [https://schugle.de](https://schugle.de)
* [https://schugle.de/einstieg](https://schugle.de/einstieg)

In your proposal, please answer the following:

1. In your own words, what does Schugle do?
2. What do you think is the central emotional idea of these videos?
3. What is one original visual concept for the 10-second hero clip?
4. How would you use the Schugle logo or tilted “g” icon?
5. What visual style do you suggest?
6. Which tools/software will you use?
7. Which editable source files will you deliver?
8. How will you make sure German text remains editable?
9. What is included in your fixed price?

description:

The platform will be designed to provide a seamless and secure environment for users to invest in various assets, view portfolio performance, and track market data in real-time.

The project requires integration with financial data providers for real-time stock/asset prices, a user-friendly interface, secure account management, and investment tracking tools.

Key Features:
User Registration and Authentication: Secure sign-up/login with multi-factor authentication.
Investment Dashboard: A clean, user-friendly dashboard where users can view their portfolio, track investment performance, and see relevant market data.
Real-Time Data: Integration with APIs for real-time financial data (stock prices, asset values, etc.).
Transaction History: A feature that allows users to view their past transactions, including deposits, withdrawals, and investments.
Security Features: Strong encryption for user data and financial transactions.
Payment Integration: Integration with a payment gateway for deposits and withdrawals.
Admin Panel: An admin dashboard for managing user accounts, transactions, and viewing overall platform performance.

Full-stack development experience, with strong skills in React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB (or a similar database), and REST APIs.

Familiarity with financial APIs and how to integrate them into the platform.
Knowledge of responsive design to ensure the platform works well on both desktop and mobile devices.
Ability to work collaboratively and meet project deadlines.

Documentation on the development process, the tech stack used, and instructions for deployment.
A user manual for basic platform functionality.

Important Notes:
Please share your portfolio with previous projects related to web application development, especially financial platforms or investment tools.
We are looking for a developer who is reliable, communicates clearly, and can provide updates as milestones are achieved.
Experience with building secure, scalable applications is crucial.

description:
Hello,
I need a schematic and 2-layer PCB layout for an automotive-grade Multi-Port USB Charger box. It's a hardware-only project (no firmware/software).

Key Goals:
Target Manufacturing Cost: Under €15 per unit (PCBA) for a 100-unit run.
Component Selection: Must use low-cost, highly integrated standard ICs (e.g., Injoinic, Southchip) from LCSC/JLCPCB.
PCB Size: Approx. 65 x 40 mm or smaller (Open-Frame).
Mounting: M3 screw holes in the corners with a strict 6mm diameter keep-out zone.

Interfaces & Topology
 Input: 12V/24V DC + 1x SMD USB port (Data-Input from car radio).
Outputs ($90^\circ$ Shrouded JST PH 2.0 connectors):
Port 1 & 2 (USB-A): Shared Buck-Regler (QC3.0 / Apple 2.4A, max. 24W total).
Port 3 (USB-C): Shared USB-PD 3.0 / QC3.0 combo controller.
Port 4 (USB-C Combo): Shares power with Port 3 (max. 30W-40W total) + passive $D+/D-$ data bypass from the Radio-Input for Android Auto/CarPlay.

Safety & Protection (Mandatory)
Input: On-board Car-Mini-Fuse (7.5A/10A) + TVS Load-Dump protection (ISO 7637-2).
EMC: LC filter according to CISPR 25 (No radio interference).
Output: Individual PTC/Polyfuse + ESD protection (15 kV) on all JST ports.

Deliverables: 
Complete Schematics & PCB Layout (2-Layer, FR4, 1.6mm, $\ge35\mu m$ copper).
Production files: Gerbers, CPL (Pick&Place), BOM (LCSC part numbers), and a 3D STEP file.

Please share your previous automotive/power delivery PCB designs. Looking forward to your bids!
